## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes (including hypothesis round-trip tests)
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] Spec (`docs/spec.md`) updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Benchmark results regenerated (`python benchmarks/run.py`) if the encoder,
      datasets, or harness changed
- [ ] Any performance/savings claim in this PR is backed by a committed measurement
